articles.title_en: Russia’s digital ministry expands the list of user data that telecom operators must share with security services
articles.lead_en: Russia’s Digital Development Ministry has drafted updated requirements for telecom operators specifying what user data they must store and share with security services through the operational investigative measures system (SORM). The ministry’s order was published on the official legal information portal and flagged by the Russian business daily Kommersant.

articles.title_en: Large families in focus: what will change in the budgets of families with children in 2026
articles.lead_en: Several innovations concerning the welfare of large families will come into force in 2026. From June 1, the Social Fund of Russia (SFR) begins accepting applications for a new annual family benefit for working parents with two or more children.

articles.lead_raw: Сразу несколько нововведений, касающихся благосостояния многодетных семей, вступают в силу в 2026 году. С 1 июня Социальный фонд России (СФР) начинает прием заявок на получение новой ежегодной семейной выплаты для работающих родителей с двумя и более детьми.
